name: Lentils Ole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped scallions (including some green parts)
1/2 teaspoon Crushed cumin seeds OR 3/8 teaspoon Ground cumin
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring the water and lentils to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover the pan, and simmer the lentils for 25-30 minutes or until tender but not mushy. Do not overcook.
3. While cooking the lentils, in a medium-sized skillet with a nonstick surface, heat the oil. Add garlic, scallions, green pepper, cumin (crushed seeds or ground), and chili powder. Sauté for 2 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
4. Stir in tomato sauce, vinegar, and molasses, and simmer the mixture for 1 minute.
5. When lentils are cooked, add vegetable mixture to lentils and heat through before serving over rice or with corn.
Note: Serve hot.
